english: Want to grab coffee?
context: Inviting a coworker for a coffee break

translations.pt-BR: Quer pegar um cafe?
translations.es: Quieres tomar un cafe?
translations.fr: Tu veux prendre un cafe?
translations.de: Willst du einen Kaffee holen?
translations.it: Vuoi prendere un caffe?

english: How was your weekend?
context: Monday morning water cooler chat with a teammate

translations.pt-BR: Como foi seu fim de semana?
translations.es: Como fue tu fin de semana?
translations.fr: Comment etait ton week-end?
translations.de: Wie war dein Wochenende?
translations.it: Com'e stato il tuo fine settimana?

english: Where are you guys going for lunch?
context: Asking teammates about lunch plans

translations.pt-BR: Onde voces vao almocar?
translations.es: Donde van a almorzar?
translations.fr: Ou est-ce que vous allez manger?
translations.de: Wo geht ihr zum Mittagessen hin?
translations.it: Dove andate a pranzo?

english: Hey, welcome to the team!
context: Greeting a new team member on their first day

translations.pt-BR: Ei, bem-vindo ao time!
translations.es: Oye, bienvenido al equipo!
translations.fr: Salut, bienvenue dans l'equipe!
translations.de: Hey, willkommen im Team!
translations.it: Ciao, benvenuto nel team!

english: I need a break, my brain is fried.
context: Telling a coworker you need to step away after intense coding

translations.pt-BR: Preciso de uma pausa, meu cerebro esta frito.
translations.es: Necesito un descanso, mi cerebro esta frito.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin d'une pause, mon cerveau est grille.
translations.de: Ich brauche eine Pause, mein Gehirn ist durch.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di una pausa, il mio cervello e fritto.

english: Are you working from home tomorrow?
context: Asking a colleague about their remote work plans

translations.pt-BR: Voce vai trabalhar de casa amanha?
translations.es: Vas a trabajar desde casa manana?
translations.fr: Tu travailles depuis chez toi demain?
translations.de: Arbeitest du morgen von zu Hause aus?
translations.it: Lavori da casa domani?

english: Anyone up for a team lunch today?
context: Proposing a group lunch outing to the team

translations.pt-BR: Alguem topa um almoco em equipe hoje?
translations.es: Alguien se apunta a un almuerzo de equipo hoy?
translations.fr: Quelqu'un est partant pour un dejeuner d'equipe aujourd'hui?
translations.de: Hat jemand Lust auf ein Team-Mittagessen heute?
translations.it: Qualcuno vuole fare un pranzo di gruppo oggi?

english: That meeting could have been an email.
context: Joking with a coworker after a long unnecessary meeting

translations.pt-BR: Essa reuniao poderia ter sido um e-mail.
translations.es: Esa reunion podria haber sido un correo.
translations.fr: Cette reunion aurait pu etre un e-mail.
translations.de: Dieses Meeting hatte eine E-Mail sein konnen.
translations.it: Quella riunione poteva essere un'e-mail.

english: Did you see the message in the general channel?
context: Asking if a teammate saw a Slack or Teams announcement

translations.pt-BR: Voce viu a mensagem no canal geral?
translations.es: Viste el mensaje en el canal general?
translations.fr: Tu as vu le message dans le canal general?
translations.de: Hast du die Nachricht im allgemeinen Kanal gesehen?
translations.it: Hai visto il messaggio nel canale generale?

english: I'm going to step out for some fresh air.
context: Letting your team know you are taking a short outdoor break

translations.pt-BR: Vou sair um pouco para tomar ar fresco.
translations.es: Voy a salir un rato a tomar aire fresco.
translations.fr: Je vais sortir prendre l'air un moment.
translations.de: Ich gehe kurz raus an die frische Luft.
translations.it: Esco un attimo a prendere un po' d'aria fresca.

english: We should celebrate, the release went smoothly!
context: Suggesting a team celebration after a successful deployment

translations.pt-BR: Deveriamos comemorar, o lancamento foi tranquilo!
translations.es: Deberiamos celebrar, el lanzamiento salio bien!
translations.fr: On devrait feter ca, la mise en production s'est bien passee!
translations.de: Wir sollten feiern, das Release lief reibungslos!
translations.it: Dovremmo festeggiare, il rilascio e andato liscio!

english: I've been heads down all morning, what did I miss?
context: Catching up with the team after a focused coding session

translations.pt-BR: Fiquei focado a manha toda, o que eu perdi?
translations.es: Estuve concentrado toda la manana, que me perdi?
translations.fr: J'etais a fond toute la matinee, j'ai rate quoi?
translations.de: Ich war den ganzen Morgen vertieft, was habe ich verpasst?
translations.it: Sono stato concentrato tutta la mattina, cosa mi sono perso?

english: Let's do a team outing this Friday, any ideas?
context: Organizing a social event with the team

translations.pt-BR: Vamos fazer uma saida do time nesta sexta, alguma ideia?
translations.es: Hagamos una salida de equipo este viernes, alguna idea?
translations.fr: On fait une sortie d'equipe ce vendredi, des idees?
translations.de: Lass uns diesen Freitag einen Teamausflug machen, irgendwelche Ideen?
translations.it: Facciamo un'uscita di gruppo questo venerdi, qualche idea?

english: Sorry I'm late, I had a terrible commute today.
context: Apologizing for arriving late to the office

translations.pt-BR: Desculpa o atraso, o transito estava horrivel hoje.
translations.es: Perdon por llegar tarde, el trafico estuvo terrible hoy.
translations.fr: Desole pour le retard, le trajet etait horrible aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Entschuldigung fur die Verspatung, der Arbeitsweg war heute furchtbar.
translations.it: Scusate il ritardo, il tragitto e stato terribile oggi.

english: Have you tried that new restaurant around the corner?
context: Recommending a new place to eat near the office

translations.pt-BR: Voce ja experimentou aquele restaurante novo ali na esquina?
translations.es: Has probado ese restaurante nuevo a la vuelta de la esquina?
translations.fr: Tu as essaye le nouveau restaurant au coin de la rue?
translations.de: Hast du das neue Restaurant um die Ecke schon ausprobiert?
translations.it: Hai provato quel nuovo ristorante dietro l'angolo?

english: I'm logging off early today, I have a doctor's appointment.
context: Informing the team about leaving early for a personal reason

translations.pt-BR: Vou sair mais cedo hoje, tenho consulta medica.
translations.es: Me desconecto temprano hoy, tengo cita con el medico.
translations.fr: Je me deconnecte tot aujourd'hui, j'ai un rendez-vous medical.
translations.de: Ich logge mich heute fruher aus, ich habe einen Arzttermin.
translations.it: Mi scollego presto oggi, ho un appuntamento dal dottore.

english: The Wi-Fi is acting up again, is it just me?
context: Complaining about office internet issues to nearby coworkers

translations.pt-BR: O Wi-Fi esta com problema de novo, e so comigo?
translations.es: El Wi-Fi esta fallando otra vez, soy solo yo?
translations.fr: Le Wi-Fi deconne encore, c'est que moi?
translations.de: Das WLAN spinnt wieder, liegt das nur an mir?
translations.it: Il Wi-Fi sta dando problemi di nuovo, sono solo io?

english: Do you want to pair on this? I could use a second pair of eyes.
context: Asking a teammate to collaborate on a tricky problem

translations.pt-BR: Quer fazer par nisto? Eu preciso de uma segunda opiniao.
translations.es: Quieres hacer pair en esto? Me vendria bien otra perspectiva.
translations.fr: Tu veux qu'on bosse en binome la-dessus? Un second regard serait utile.
translations.de: Willst du das zusammen machen? Ich konnte ein zweites Augenpaar gebrauchen.
translations.it: Vuoi lavorarci insieme? Mi servirebbe un secondo parere.

english: I'm in the zone right now, can we chat later?
context: Politely declining an interruption while focused on coding

translations.pt-BR: Estou no fluxo agora, podemos conversar depois?
translations.es: Estoy en la zona ahora, podemos hablar luego?
translations.fr: Je suis dans le flow la, on peut discuter plus tard?
translations.de: Ich bin gerade voll drin, konnen wir spater reden?
translations.it: Sono nel flusso adesso, possiamo parlare dopo?

english: Happy Friday! Any plans for the weekend?
context: End-of-week casual chat with colleagues

translations.pt-BR: Feliz sexta! Algum plano pro fim de semana?
translations.es: Feliz viernes! Algun plan para el fin de semana?
translations.fr: Bon vendredi! Des plans pour le week-end?
translations.de: Schonen Freitag! Hast du Plane furs Wochenende?
translations.it: Buon venerdi! Qualche piano per il fine settimana?

english: I just pushed a fix that's been bugging me for days, what a relief!
context: Sharing your excitement after solving a stubborn bug

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de subir um fix que estava me incomodando ha dias, que alivio!
translations.es: Acabo de subir un fix que me tenia loco por dias, que alivio!
translations.fr: Je viens de pousser un correctif qui me tracassait depuis des jours, quel soulagement!
translations.de: Ich habe gerade einen Fix gepusht, der mich tagelang genervt hat, was fur eine Erleichterung!
translations.it: Ho appena pushato un fix che mi tormentava da giorni, che sollievo!

english: We should set up a virtual coffee chat since half the team is remote.
context: Suggesting a social video call for distributed team bonding

translations.pt-BR: Deveriamos marcar um cafe virtual ja que metade do time esta remoto.
translations.es: Deberiamos organizar un cafe virtual ya que la mitad del equipo trabaja remoto.
translations.fr: On devrait organiser un cafe virtuel vu que la moitie de l'equipe est en teletravail.
translations.de: Wir sollten einen virtuellen Kaffee-Chat einrichten, da die Halfte des Teams remote arbeitet.
translations.it: Dovremmo organizzare un caffe virtuale visto che meta del team e in remoto.

english: Don't forget to take breaks, burnout is real.
context: Reminding a teammate about work-life balance during crunch time

translations.pt-BR: Nao esqueca de fazer pausas, burnout e real.
translations.es: No olvides tomar descansos, el burnout es real.
translations.fr: N'oublie pas de faire des pauses, le burnout c'est reel.
translations.de: Vergiss nicht, Pausen zu machen, Burnout ist real.
translations.it: Non dimenticare di fare pause, il burnout e reale.

english: The new hire seems really sharp, I think they'll fit right in.
context: Sharing a positive impression about a new team member with a colleague

translations.pt-BR: O novo contratado parece bem afiado, acho que vai se encaixar bem.
translations.es: El nuevo parece muy habil, creo que va a encajar perfecto.
translations.fr: Le nouveau a l'air vraiment vif, je pense qu'il va bien s'integrer.
translations.de: Der Neue scheint echt fit zu sein, ich denke, er wird gut reinpassen.
translations.it: Il nuovo assunto sembra davvero in gamba, penso che si integrera bene.

english: I accidentally deployed to production instead of staging, I nearly had a heart attack.
context: Telling a teammate about a scary deployment mistake

translations.pt-BR: Eu acidentalmente fiz deploy em producao em vez de staging, quase tive um infarto.
translations.es: Accidentalmente hice deploy a produccion en vez de staging, casi me da un infarto.
translations.fr: J'ai deploye en production au lieu de staging par accident, j'ai failli avoir une crise cardiaque.
translations.de: Ich habe aus Versehen in Produktion statt Staging deployed, ich hatte fast einen Herzinfarkt.
translations.it: Ho deployato in produzione invece che in staging per sbaglio, mi e quasi venuto un infarto.

english: Let's wrap up and call it a day, we've earned it after this sprint.
context: Suggesting the team stop working after a productive sprint

translations.pt-BR: Vamos encerrar por hoje, merecemos depois desse sprint.
translations.es: Terminemos por hoy, nos lo ganamos despues de este sprint.
translations.fr: On boucle et on arrete pour aujourd'hui, on l'a bien merite apres ce sprint.
translations.de: Lass uns Schluss machen fur heute, wir haben es nach diesem Sprint verdient.
translations.it: Chiudiamo e finiamo per oggi, ce lo siamo meritato dopo questo sprint.

english: Who broke the build? The CI pipeline has been red all morning.
context: Jokingly asking who caused a build failure in the shared pipeline

translations.pt-BR: Quem quebrou o build? O pipeline de CI esta vermelho a manha toda.
translations.es: Quien rompio el build? El pipeline de CI ha estado rojo toda la manana.
translations.fr: Qui a casse le build? Le pipeline CI est rouge depuis ce matin.
translations.de: Wer hat den Build kaputt gemacht? Die CI-Pipeline ist den ganzen Morgen rot.
translations.it: Chi ha rotto la build? La pipeline CI e rossa tutta la mattina.

english: I'm thinking of switching to a standing desk, my back is killing me.
context: Discussing ergonomic setup with a coworker

translations.pt-BR: Estou pensando em mudar para uma mesa de pe, minhas costas estao me matando.
translations.es: Estoy pensando en cambiar a un escritorio de pie, la espalda me esta matando.
translations.fr: Je pense passer a un bureau debout, mon dos me tue.
translations.de: Ich uberlege, auf einen Stehschreibtisch zu wechseln, mein Rucken bringt mich um.
translations.it: Sto pensando di passare a una scrivania in piedi, la schiena mi sta uccidendo.

english: Can you believe it's already the end of the quarter? Time flies when you're shipping features.
context: Reflecting on how fast time passed during a busy development period

translations.pt-BR: Voce acredita que ja e fim de trimestre? O tempo voa quando se esta entregando features.
translations.es: Puedes creer que ya es fin de trimestre? El tiempo vuela cuando entregas funcionalidades.
translations.fr: Tu peux croire qu'on est deja en fin de trimestre? Le temps file quand on livre des fonctionnalites.
translations.de: Kannst du glauben, dass schon Quartalsende ist? Die Zeit fliegt, wenn man Features ausliefert.
translations.it: Riesci a credere che e gia fine trimestre? Il tempo vola quando si rilasciano funzionalita.

english: I'll be on PTO next week, but feel free to ping me if anything is on fire.
context: Informing the team about upcoming time off while offering emergency availability

translations.pt-BR: Estarei de ferias na proxima semana, mas podem me chamar se algo estiver pegando fogo.
translations.es: Estare de vacaciones la proxima semana, pero no duden en escribirme si algo se prende fuego.
translations.fr: Je serai en conge la semaine prochaine, mais n'hesitez pas a me contacter si ca brule.
translations.de: Ich bin nachste Woche im Urlaub, aber meldet euch ruhig, wenn etwas brennt.
translations.it: Saro in ferie la prossima settimana, ma scrivetemi pure se qualcosa va a fuoco.

english: Did you see that new JavaScript framework that dropped yesterday?
context: Water cooler talk about the latest tech news

translations.pt-BR: Voce viu aquele novo framework JavaScript que lancaram ontem?
translations.es: Viste ese nuevo framework de JavaScript que salio ayer?
translations.fr: Tu as vu ce nouveau framework JavaScript sorti hier?
translations.de: Hast du das neue JavaScript-Framework gesehen, das gestern rausgekommen ist?
translations.it: Hai visto quel nuovo framework JavaScript uscito ieri?

english: I need coffee before I can even look at code today.
context: Monday morning or early start conversation

translations.pt-BR: Preciso de cafe antes de conseguir olhar pra codigo hoje.
translations.es: Necesito cafe antes de poder siquiera mirar codigo hoy.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin d'un cafe avant de pouvoir ne serait-ce que regarder du code aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Ich brauche erstmal Kaffee, bevor ich heute auch nur Code anschauen kann.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un caffe prima di poter anche solo guardare il codice oggi.

english: Have you read that blog post about clean architecture? It's really worth checking out.
context: Recommending a tech blog article to a colleague

translations.pt-BR: Voce leu aquele post sobre clean architecture? Vale muito a pena conferir.
translations.es: Leiste ese articulo sobre clean architecture? Realmente vale la pena leerlo.
translations.fr: Tu as lu cet article de blog sur la clean architecture? Ca vaut vraiment le coup d'y jeter un oeil.
translations.de: Hast du den Blogbeitrag uber Clean Architecture gelesen? Den sollte man sich echt anschauen.
translations.it: Hai letto quel post sulla clean architecture? Vale davvero la pena darci un'occhiata.

english: Did you guys see the meme about CSS centering? I just shared it in the team chat.
context: Sharing a funny developer meme with the team

translations.pt-BR: Voces viram o meme sobre centralizar em CSS? Acabei de mandar no chat do time.
translations.es: Vieron el meme sobre centrar en CSS? Lo acabo de compartir en el chat del equipo.
translations.fr: Vous avez vu le meme sur le centrage CSS? Je viens de le partager dans le chat d'equipe.
translations.de: Habt ihr das Meme uber CSS-Zentrierung gesehen? Ich habe es gerade im Teamchat geteilt.
translations.it: Avete visto il meme sul centrare in CSS? L'ho appena condiviso nella chat del team.

english: I've been mass debugging for three hours and it was a missing semicolon.
context: Commiserating after a frustrating debugging session

translations.pt-BR: Fiquei tres horas debugando e era um ponto e virgula faltando.
translations.es: Llevo tres horas depurando y era un punto y coma que faltaba.
translations.fr: J'ai debogue pendant trois heures et c'etait un point-virgule manquant.
translations.de: Ich habe drei Stunden debuggt und es war ein fehlendes Semikolon.
translations.it: Ho fatto debugging per tre ore ed era un punto e virgola mancante.

english: Are you team dark mode or light mode?
context: Classic developer debate about IDE appearance

translations.pt-BR: Voce e do time dark mode ou light mode?
translations.es: Eres del equipo modo oscuro o modo claro?
translations.fr: Tu es equipe mode sombre ou mode clair?
translations.de: Bist du Team Dark Mode oder Light Mode?
translations.it: Sei del team dark mode o light mode?

english: I started a side project this weekend and I'm already overthinking the architecture.
context: Discussing personal coding projects

translations.pt-BR: Comecei um projeto pessoal nesse fim de semana e ja estou pensando demais na arquitetura.
translations.es: Empece un proyecto personal este fin de semana y ya estoy sobreanalizando la arquitectura.
translations.fr: J'ai commence un side project ce week-end et je suis deja en train de trop reflechir a l'architecture.
translations.de: Ich habe am Wochenende ein Nebenprojekt angefangen und uberdenke schon die Architektur.
translations.it: Ho iniziato un progetto personale questo weekend e sto gia pensando troppo all'architettura.

english: Have you tried turning it off and on again?
context: Classic IT humor when someone has a tech issue

translations.pt-BR: Voce ja tentou desligar e ligar de novo?
translations.es: Has probado a apagarlo y encenderlo de nuevo?
translations.fr: Tu as essaye de l'eteindre et de le rallumer?
translations.de: Hast du schon versucht, es aus- und wieder einzuschalten?
translations.it: Hai provato a spegnerlo e riaccenderlo?

english: Stack Overflow saved my life again today.
context: Grateful mention of finding a solution online

translations.pt-BR: O Stack Overflow salvou minha vida de novo hoje.
translations.es: Stack Overflow me salvo la vida otra vez hoy.
translations.fr: Stack Overflow m'a encore sauve la vie aujourd'hui.
translations.de: Stack Overflow hat mir heute wieder das Leben gerettet.
translations.it: Stack Overflow mi ha salvato la vita ancora oggi.

english: It's not a bug, it's an undocumented feature!
context: Classic developer joke when defending quirky behavior

translations.pt-BR: Nao e um bug, e uma funcionalidade nao documentada!
translations.es: No es un bug, es una funcionalidad no documentada!
translations.fr: Ce n'est pas un bug, c'est une fonctionnalite non documentee!
translations.de: Das ist kein Bug, das ist ein undokumentiertes Feature!
translations.it: Non e un bug, e una funzionalita non documentata!

english: I spent the whole weekend customizing my Neovim config and got zero actual coding done.
context: Discussing IDE and tool customization obsession

translations.pt-BR: Passei o fim de semana inteiro customizando meu Neovim e nao programei nada de verdade.
translations.es: Pase todo el fin de semana personalizando mi configuracion de Neovim y no programe nada real.
translations.fr: J'ai passe tout le week-end a personnaliser ma config Neovim et je n'ai pas code du tout.
translations.de: Ich habe das ganze Wochenende meine Neovim-Konfiguration angepasst und null echten Code geschrieben.
translations.it: Ho passato tutto il weekend a personalizzare la mia configurazione di Neovim e non ho programmato niente di concreto.

english: Do you ever get imposter syndrome when reading other people's code?
context: Supportive conversation about self-doubt in tech

translations.pt-BR: Voce sente sindrome do impostor quando le codigo dos outros?
translations.es: Alguna vez sientes sindrome del impostor cuando lees el codigo de otros?
translations.fr: Tu as deja le syndrome de l'imposteur en lisant le code des autres?
translations.de: Hast du manchmal Imposter-Syndrom, wenn du den Code anderer liest?
translations.it: Ti capita mai di avere la sindrome dell'impostore quando leggi il codice degli altri?

english: Working from home is great until your cat walks across your keyboard during a demo.
context: Remote work humor and experiences

translations.pt-BR: Trabalhar de casa e otimo ate seu gato andar no teclado durante uma demo.
translations.es: Trabajar desde casa es genial hasta que tu gato camina sobre tu teclado durante una demo.
translations.fr: Le teletravail c'est genial jusqu'a ce que ton chat marche sur ton clavier pendant une demo.
translations.de: Homeoffice ist super, bis deine Katze wahrend einer Demo uber die Tastatur lauft.
translations.it: Lavorare da casa e fantastico finche il tuo gatto non cammina sulla tastiera durante una demo.

english: What mechanical keyboard are you using? I'm thinking of getting a new one.
context: Discussing desk setup and gear preferences

translations.pt-BR: Qual teclado mecanico voce usa? To pensando em comprar um novo.
translations.es: Que teclado mecanico usas? Estoy pensando en comprar uno nuevo.
translations.fr: Tu utilises quel clavier mecanique? Je pense en acheter un nouveau.
translations.de: Welche mechanische Tastatur benutzt du? Ich uberlege, mir eine neue zu holen.
translations.it: Che tastiera meccanica usi? Sto pensando di prenderne una nuova.

english: I explained the problem to my rubber duck and actually found the solution.
context: Reference to rubber duck debugging technique

translations.pt-BR: Expliquei o problema pro meu patinho de borracha e realmente encontrei a solucao.
translations.es: Le explique el problema a mi patito de goma y realmente encontre la solucion.
translations.fr: J'ai explique le probleme a mon canard en caoutchouc et j'ai vraiment trouve la solution.
translations.de: Ich habe das Problem meiner Gummiente erklart und tatsachlich die Losung gefunden.
translations.it: Ho spiegato il problema alla mia paperella di gomma e ho trovato davvero la soluzione.

english: Anyone else feel like Mondays should be optional for developers?
context: Monday morning greetings and shared feelings

translations.pt-BR: Mais alguem acha que segunda-feira deveria ser opcional pra devs?
translations.es: Alguien mas siente que los lunes deberian ser opcionales para los desarrolladores?
translations.fr: Quelqu'un d'autre pense que les lundis devraient etre optionnels pour les developpeurs?
translations.de: Findet noch jemand, dass Montage fur Entwickler optional sein sollten?
translations.it: Qualcun altro pensa che i lunedi dovrebbero essere opzionali per gli sviluppatori?

english: I just discovered this VS Code extension and it's a total game changer.
context: Sharing a new tool or framework discovery

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de descobrir essa extensao do VS Code e mudou completamente meu jogo.
translations.es: Acabo de descubrir esta extension de VS Code y es un cambio total.
translations.fr: Je viens de decouvrir cette extension VS Code et c'est revolutionnaire.
translations.de: Ich habe gerade diese VS Code-Erweiterung entdeckt und sie ist ein absoluter Gamechanger.
translations.it: Ho appena scoperto questa estensione di VS Code ed e una svolta totale.

english: The funniest error message I ever got was 'success: operation failed successfully'.
context: Sharing funny error messages encountered

translations.pt-BR: A mensagem de erro mais engracada que ja recebi foi 'sucesso: operacao falhou com sucesso'.
translations.es: El mensaje de error mas gracioso que he recibido fue 'exito: la operacion fallo exitosamente'.
translations.fr: Le message d'erreur le plus drole que j'ai vu c'etait 'succes: l'operation a echoue avec succes'.
translations.de: Die lustigste Fehlermeldung, die ich je bekommen habe, war 'Erfolg: Operation erfolgreich fehlgeschlagen'.
translations.it: Il messaggio di errore piu divertente che abbia mai ricevuto e stato 'successo: operazione fallita con successo'.

english: Want to grab lunch? I need a break from staring at this merge conflict.
context: Team lunch planning during a tough work session

translations.pt-BR: Quer almocar? Preciso de uma pausa de ficar olhando pra esse conflito de merge.
translations.es: Quieres ir a almorzar? Necesito un descanso de mirar este conflicto de merge.
translations.fr: On va manger? J'ai besoin d'une pause, je fixe ce conflit de merge.
translations.de: Wollen wir Mittagessen gehen? Ich brauche eine Pause von diesem Merge-Konflikt.
translations.it: Andiamo a pranzo? Ho bisogno di una pausa da questo conflitto di merge.

english: I've been tinkering with a side project using Rust, want to hear about it?
context: Chatting with a coworker about a personal coding project

translations.pt-BR: Tenho mexido num projeto pessoal usando Rust, quer saber mais?
translations.es: He estado trabajando en un proyecto personal usando Rust, quieres que te cuente?
translations.fr: Je bidouille un side project en Rust, tu veux que je t'en parle?
translations.de: Ich bastle an einem Nebenprojekt in Rust, willst du davon horen?
translations.it: Sto smanettando con un progetto personale in Rust, vuoi sentirne parlare?

english: Are you going to that tech conference next month?
context: Asking a colleague about upcoming tech events

translations.pt-BR: Voce vai naquela conferencia de tecnologia mes que vem?
translations.es: Vas a ir a esa conferencia de tecnologia el proximo mes?
translations.fr: Tu vas a cette conference tech le mois prochain?
translations.de: Gehst du nachsten Monat zu dieser Tech-Konferenz?
translations.it: Vai a quella conferenza tech il mese prossimo?

english: I finally upgraded my home office monitor, it makes such a difference.
context: Discussing home office setup improvements

translations.pt-BR: Finalmente troquei o monitor do meu home office, faz muita diferenca.
translations.es: Por fin mejore el monitor de mi oficina en casa, hace una gran diferencia.
translations.fr: J'ai enfin ameliore mon ecran de bureau a la maison, ca change tout.
translations.de: Ich habe endlich meinen Homeoffice-Monitor aufgerustet, das macht so einen Unterschied.
translations.it: Ho finalmente aggiornato il monitor del mio ufficio a casa, fa una differenza enorme.

english: What podcast do you listen to while coding?
context: Asking for podcast recommendations during work

translations.pt-BR: Qual podcast voce ouve enquanto programa?
translations.es: Que podcast escuchas mientras programas?
translations.fr: Tu ecoutes quel podcast en codant?
translations.de: Welchen Podcast horst du beim Programmieren?
translations.it: Che podcast ascolti mentre programmi?

english: Someone brought donuts to the office, they're in the kitchen!
context: Announcing free food in the office break room

translations.pt-BR: Alguem trouxe donuts pro escritorio, estao na cozinha!
translations.es: Alguien trajo donas a la oficina, estan en la cocina!
translations.fr: Quelqu'un a apporte des beignets au bureau, ils sont dans la cuisine!
translations.de: Jemand hat Donuts ins Buro mitgebracht, sie sind in der Kuche!
translations.it: Qualcuno ha portato ciambelle in ufficio, sono in cucina!

english: Do you play any video games, or is coding enough screen time for you?
context: Asking about hobbies and gaming outside of work

translations.pt-BR: Voce joga algum video game, ou programar ja e tempo de tela suficiente?
translations.es: Juegas algun videojuego, o programar ya es suficiente tiempo de pantalla?
translations.fr: Tu joues a des jeux video, ou le code c'est deja assez d'ecran pour toi?
translations.de: Spielst du Videospiele, oder ist Programmieren genug Bildschirmzeit fur dich?
translations.it: Giochi ai videogiochi, o programmare e gia abbastanza tempo davanti allo schermo?

english: I have back-to-back meetings all afternoon, I won't get anything done.
context: Complaining about a packed meeting schedule

translations.pt-BR: Tenho reunioes seguidas a tarde toda, nao vou conseguir fazer nada.
translations.es: Tengo reuniones consecutivas toda la tarde, no voy a lograr hacer nada.
translations.fr: J'ai des reunions dos a dos tout l'apres-midi, je ne vais rien pouvoir faire.
translations.de: Ich habe den ganzen Nachmittag Meetings am Stuck, ich werde nichts schaffen.
translations.it: Ho riunioni una dopo l'altra tutto il pomeriggio, non riusciro a fare niente.

english: Have you seen how many stars that open source project got overnight?
context: Discussing trending GitHub repositories

translations.pt-BR: Voce viu quantas estrelas aquele projeto open source ganhou da noite pro dia?
translations.es: Has visto cuantas estrellas consiguio ese proyecto open source de la noche a la manana?
translations.fr: Tu as vu combien d'etoiles ce projet open source a eu du jour au lendemain?
translations.de: Hast du gesehen, wie viele Sterne dieses Open-Source-Projekt uber Nacht bekommen hat?
translations.it: Hai visto quante stelle ha preso quel progetto open source in una notte?

english: The weather is so nice today, I wish I could code outside.
context: Weather and commute small talk at the office

translations.pt-BR: O tempo esta tao bom hoje, queria poder programar la fora.
translations.es: El clima esta tan lindo hoy, ojala pudiera programar afuera.
translations.fr: Il fait tellement beau aujourd'hui, j'aimerais pouvoir coder dehors.
translations.de: Das Wetter ist so schon heute, ich wunschte, ich konnte draussen programmieren.
translations.it: Il tempo e cosi bello oggi, vorrei poter programmare fuori.

english: I'm thinking about getting a certification, do you think it's worth it?
context: Career growth conversation about professional certifications

translations.pt-BR: Estou pensando em tirar uma certificacao, voce acha que vale a pena?
translations.es: Estoy pensando en sacar una certificacion, crees que vale la pena?
translations.fr: Je pense passer une certification, tu penses que ca vaut le coup?
translations.de: Ich uberlege, eine Zertifizierung zu machen, denkst du, das lohnt sich?
translations.it: Sto pensando di prendere una certificazione, pensi che ne valga la pena?

english: My desk plant is the only thing keeping me sane during long debugging sessions.
context: Joking about office plants and workspace personalization

translations.pt-BR: Minha planta na mesa e a unica coisa que me mantem sao durante longas sessoes de debug.
translations.es: Mi planta del escritorio es lo unico que me mantiene cuerdo durante largas sesiones de depuracion.
translations.fr: Ma plante de bureau est la seule chose qui me garde sain d'esprit pendant les longues sessions de debogage.
translations.de: Meine Schreibtischpflanze ist das Einzige, was mich bei langen Debug-Sitzungen bei Verstand halt.
translations.it: La mia pianta sulla scrivania e l'unica cosa che mi tiene sano di mente durante le lunghe sessioni di debug.

english: What kind of music do you listen to while coding? I can't focus without lo-fi beats.
context: Discussing music preferences during work

translations.pt-BR: Que tipo de musica voce ouve enquanto programa? Eu nao consigo focar sem lo-fi.
translations.es: Que tipo de musica escuchas mientras programas? No puedo concentrarme sin lo-fi.
translations.fr: Quel genre de musique tu ecoutes en codant? Je ne peux pas me concentrer sans du lo-fi.
translations.de: Was fur Musik horst du beim Programmieren? Ich kann mich ohne Lo-fi nicht konzentrieren.
translations.it: Che tipo di musica ascolti mentre programmi? Non riesco a concentrarmi senza lo-fi.

english: The printer is jammed again, does anyone actually know how to fix it?
context: Classic office IT frustration with shared equipment

translations.pt-BR: A impressora travou de novo, alguem realmente sabe consertar?
translations.es: La impresora se atasco otra vez, alguien realmente sabe como arreglarla?
translations.fr: L'imprimante est encore bloquee, quelqu'un sait vraiment comment la reparer?
translations.de: Der Drucker hat sich wieder verklemmt, weiss jemand wirklich, wie man ihn repariert?
translations.it: La stampante si e inceppata di nuovo, qualcuno sa davvero come ripararla?

english: Have you tried that AI coding assistant? It's surprisingly good at boilerplate.
context: Discussing new AI tools and their impact on development

translations.pt-BR: Voce ja experimentou aquele assistente de codigo com IA? E surpreendentemente bom pra boilerplate.
translations.es: Has probado ese asistente de programacion con IA? Es sorprendentemente bueno para boilerplate.
translations.fr: Tu as essaye cet assistant de code IA? C'est etonnamment bon pour le boilerplate.
translations.de: Hast du diesen KI-Coding-Assistenten ausprobiert? Er ist uberraschend gut bei Boilerplate.
translations.it: Hai provato quell'assistente di programmazione con IA? E sorprendentemente bravo col boilerplate.

english: Does the company cover conference tickets or do we have to pay out of pocket?
context: Asking about company benefits for professional development

translations.pt-BR: A empresa cobre ingressos de conferencia ou temos que pagar do bolso?
translations.es: La empresa cubre las entradas de conferencias o tenemos que pagar de nuestro bolsillo?
translations.fr: L'entreprise prend en charge les billets de conference ou on doit payer de notre poche?
translations.de: Ubernimmt die Firma Konferenztickets oder mussen wir selbst zahlen?
translations.it: L'azienda copre i biglietti per le conferenze o dobbiamo pagare di tasca nostra?

english: I covered my laptop with developer stickers, there's no space left.
context: Talking about developer swag and sticker collections

translations.pt-BR: Cobri meu notebook com adesivos de dev, nao tem mais espaco.
translations.es: Llene mi laptop de stickers de desarrollador, ya no queda espacio.
translations.fr: J'ai couvert mon laptop de stickers de dev, il n'y a plus de place.
translations.de: Ich habe meinen Laptop mit Entwickler-Stickern beklebt, es ist kein Platz mehr.
translations.it: Ho coperto il mio portatile di adesivi da sviluppatore, non c'e piu spazio.

english: I prefer working from home but I miss the office snacks honestly.
context: Remote vs office debate with a touch of humor

translations.pt-BR: Prefiro trabalhar de casa mas sinto falta dos lanches do escritorio sinceramente.
translations.es: Prefiero trabajar desde casa pero sinceramente extrano los snacks de la oficina.
translations.fr: Je prefere travailler de chez moi mais les snacks du bureau me manquent franchement.
translations.de: Ich arbeite lieber von zu Hause, aber die Snacks im Buro vermisse ich ehrlich gesagt.
translations.it: Preferisco lavorare da casa ma sinceramente mi mancano gli spuntini dell'ufficio.

english: Who's organizing the holiday party this year? We need to start planning.
context: End-of-year party planning conversation

translations.pt-BR: Quem esta organizando a festa de fim de ano? Precisamos comecar a planejar.
translations.es: Quien organiza la fiesta de fin de ano? Necesitamos empezar a planear.
translations.fr: Qui organise la fete de fin d'annee cette annee? On doit commencer a planifier.
translations.de: Wer organisiert dieses Jahr die Weihnachtsfeier? Wir mussen anfangen zu planen.
translations.it: Chi organizza la festa di fine anno quest'anno? Dobbiamo iniziare a pianificare.

english: My two monitors aren't enough anymore, I think I need a third one.
context: Joking about needing more screen real estate

translations.pt-BR: Meus dois monitores nao sao mais suficientes, acho que preciso de um terceiro.
translations.es: Mis dos monitores ya no son suficientes, creo que necesito un tercero.
translations.fr: Mes deux ecrans ne suffisent plus, je pense qu'il m'en faut un troisieme.
translations.de: Meine zwei Monitore reichen nicht mehr, ich glaube ich brauche einen dritten.
translations.it: I miei due monitor non bastano piu, penso di aver bisogno di un terzo.

english: I just contributed to an open source project for the first time, it felt amazing.
context: Sharing excitement about first open source contribution

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de contribuir para um projeto open source pela primeira vez, foi incrivel.
translations.es: Acabo de contribuir a un proyecto open source por primera vez, se sintio increible.
translations.fr: Je viens de contribuer a un projet open source pour la premiere fois, c'etait genial.
translations.de: Ich habe gerade zum ersten Mal zu einem Open-Source-Projekt beigetragen, das war ein tolles Gefuhl.
translations.it: Ho appena contribuito a un progetto open source per la prima volta, e stato fantastico.

english: Traffic was insane this morning, I should have just worked from home.
context: Complaining about the morning commute

translations.pt-BR: O transito estava impossivel hoje de manha, deveria ter trabalhado de casa.
translations.es: El trafico estaba terrible esta manana, deberia haber trabajado desde casa.
translations.fr: Le trafic etait dingue ce matin, j'aurais du rester bosser de chez moi.
translations.de: Der Verkehr war heute Morgen wahnsinnig, ich hatte einfach von zu Hause arbeiten sollen.
translations.it: Il traffico era assurdo stamattina, avrei dovuto lavorare da casa.

english: Did you catch the keynote from WWDC? The new APIs look promising.
context: Discussing a tech conference keynote presentation

translations.pt-BR: Voce assistiu a keynote da WWDC? As novas APIs parecem promissoras.
translations.es: Viste la keynote de la WWDC? Las nuevas APIs se ven prometedoras.
translations.fr: Tu as vu la keynote de la WWDC? Les nouvelles APIs ont l'air prometteuses.
translations.de: Hast du die Keynote von der WWDC gesehen? Die neuen APIs sehen vielversprechend aus.
translations.it: Hai visto la keynote della WWDC? Le nuove API sembrano promettenti.

english: I'm trying to maintain a better work-life balance this quarter, no more late nights.
context: Discussing personal goals for work-life balance

translations.pt-BR: Estou tentando manter um melhor equilibrio entre trabalho e vida pessoal neste trimestre, chega de noites viradas.
translations.es: Estoy intentando mantener un mejor equilibrio trabajo-vida este trimestre, no mas noches largas.
translations.fr: J'essaie de maintenir un meilleur equilibre vie pro-vie perso ce trimestre, fini les nuits blanches.
translations.de: Ich versuche dieses Quartal eine bessere Work-Life-Balance zu halten, keine spaten Nachte mehr.
translations.it: Sto cercando di mantenere un migliore equilibrio vita-lavoro questo trimestre, basta nottate.

english: Our team building escape room last week was actually really fun.
context: Reflecting on a recent team building activity

translations.pt-BR: A escape room de team building da semana passada foi muito divertida na verdade.
translations.es: La sala de escape de team building de la semana pasada fue realmente muy divertida.
translations.fr: L'escape room de team building de la semaine derniere etait vraiment super.
translations.de: Unser Team-Building-Escape-Room letzte Woche hat tatsachlich richtig Spass gemacht.
translations.it: L'escape room di team building della settimana scorsa e stata davvero divertente.

english: I'm thinking of applying for a senior role, do you have any tips?
context: Career growth conversation about leveling up

translations.pt-BR: Estou pensando em me candidatar para uma vaga senior, voce tem alguma dica?
translations.es: Estoy pensando en aplicar para un puesto senior, tienes algun consejo?
translations.fr: Je pense postuler pour un poste senior, tu as des conseils?
translations.de: Ich uberlege mich fur eine Senior-Stelle zu bewerben, hast du Tipps?
translations.it: Sto pensando di candidarmi per un ruolo senior, hai qualche consiglio?

english: The office dog is here today, my productivity just dropped to zero.
context: Joking about an office pet being a distraction

translations.pt-BR: O cachorro do escritorio esta aqui hoje, minha produtividade caiu a zero.
translations.es: El perro de la oficina esta aqui hoy, mi productividad cayo a cero.
translations.fr: Le chien du bureau est la aujourd'hui, ma productivite vient de tomber a zero.
translations.de: Der Burohund ist heute da, meine Produktivitat ist gerade auf null gefallen.
translations.it: Il cane dell'ufficio e qui oggi, la mia produttivita e appena scesa a zero.

english: I can't code in silence, I always need some background noise.
context: Discussing coding environment preferences

translations.pt-BR: Nao consigo programar em silencio, sempre preciso de algum ruido de fundo.
translations.es: No puedo programar en silencio, siempre necesito algun ruido de fondo.
translations.fr: Je ne peux pas coder en silence, j'ai toujours besoin d'un bruit de fond.
translations.de: Ich kann nicht in Stille programmieren, ich brauche immer Hintergrundgerausche.
translations.it: Non riesco a programmare in silenzio, ho sempre bisogno di un rumore di fondo.

english: The client just called an emergency meeting at five on a Friday.
context: Frustration about poorly timed meetings

translations.pt-BR: O cliente acabou de marcar uma reuniao de emergencia as cinco numa sexta.
translations.es: El cliente acaba de convocar una reunion de emergencia a las cinco un viernes.
translations.fr: Le client vient de convoquer une reunion d'urgence a dix-sept heures un vendredi.
translations.de: Der Kunde hat gerade ein Notfall-Meeting um funf an einem Freitag einberufen.
translations.it: Il cliente ha appena convocato una riunione d'emergenza alle cinque di venerdi.

english: Everyone is talking about AI replacing developers, but I think it just makes us faster.
context: Discussing AI trends and their impact on the profession

translations.pt-BR: Todo mundo fala sobre IA substituindo desenvolvedores, mas acho que ela so nos torna mais rapidos.
translations.es: Todos hablan de que la IA reemplazara a los desarrolladores, pero creo que solo nos hace mas rapidos.
translations.fr: Tout le monde parle de l'IA qui remplace les developpeurs, mais je pense que ca nous rend juste plus rapides.
translations.de: Alle reden davon, dass KI Entwickler ersetzt, aber ich denke, sie macht uns nur schneller.
translations.it: Tutti parlano di IA che sostituisce gli sviluppatori, ma penso che ci renda solo piu veloci.

english: Do we get free lunch on Fridays or was that just a rumor?
context: Asking about company perks and benefits

translations.pt-BR: Temos almoco gratis nas sextas ou isso era so um boato?
translations.es: Tenemos almuerzo gratis los viernes o eso era solo un rumor?
translations.fr: On a le dejeuner gratuit le vendredi ou c'etait juste une rumeur?
translations.de: Gibt es freitags kostenloses Mittagessen oder war das nur ein Gerucht?
translations.it: Abbiamo il pranzo gratis il venerdi o era solo un pettegolezzo?

english: I reorganized my whole desk setup over the weekend, want to see a photo?
context: Sharing workspace personalization with a colleague

translations.pt-BR: Reorganizei toda a minha mesa no fim de semana, quer ver uma foto?
translations.es: Reorganice toda mi mesa el fin de semana, quieres ver una foto?
translations.fr: J'ai reorganise tout mon bureau ce week-end, tu veux voir une photo?
translations.de: Ich habe am Wochenende meinen ganzen Schreibtisch umorganisiert, willst du ein Foto sehen?
translations.it: Ho riorganizzato tutta la mia scrivania nel weekend, vuoi vedere una foto?

english: I got the coolest swag at that hackathon, a hoodie with a terminal print on it.
context: Showing off developer merchandise from an event

translations.pt-BR: Ganhei o melhor brinde naquele hackathon, um moletom com estampa de terminal.
translations.es: Consegui el mejor regalo en ese hackathon, una sudadera con un estampado de terminal.
translations.fr: J'ai eu le meilleur goodies a ce hackathon, un sweat avec un imprime de terminal.
translations.de: Ich habe den coolsten Merch bei diesem Hackathon bekommen, einen Hoodie mit Terminal-Aufdruck.
translations.it: Ho preso il gadget piu bello a quell'hackathon, una felpa con una stampa del terminale.

english: Three days in the office and two from home is the perfect balance for me.
context: Discussing hybrid work preferences

translations.pt-BR: Tres dias no escritorio e dois de casa e o equilibrio perfeito pra mim.
translations.es: Tres dias en la oficina y dos desde casa es el equilibrio perfecto para mi.
translations.fr: Trois jours au bureau et deux de chez moi c'est l'equilibre parfait pour moi.
translations.de: Drei Tage im Buro und zwei von zu Hause ist die perfekte Balance fur mich.
translations.it: Tre giorni in ufficio e due da casa e l'equilibrio perfetto per me.

english: Happy holidays everyone, enjoy the break and try not to check Slack!
context: Holiday season farewell message to the team

translations.pt-BR: Boas festas a todos, aproveitem a folga e tentem nao checar o Slack!
translations.es: Felices fiestas a todos, disfruten el descanso y traten de no revisar Slack!
translations.fr: Bonnes fetes a tous, profitez de la pause et essayez de ne pas regarder Slack!
translations.de: Schone Feiertage allerseits, geniesst die Pause und versucht nicht, Slack zu checken!
translations.it: Buone feste a tutti, godetevi la pausa e cercate di non controllare Slack!

english: The coffee machine broke again, this is officially a crisis.
context: Dramatic reaction to the office coffee machine being out of order

translations.pt-BR: A maquina de cafe quebrou de novo, isso oficialmente e uma crise.
translations.es: La maquina de cafe se descompuso otra vez, esto oficialmente es una crisis.
translations.fr: La machine a cafe est encore en panne, c'est officiellement une crise.
translations.de: Die Kaffeemaschine ist wieder kaputt, das ist offiziell eine Krise.
translations.it: La macchina del caffe si e rotta di nuovo, questa e ufficialmente una crisi.

english: I just got promoted to tech lead, drinks are on me tonight!
context: Celebrating a career milestone with colleagues

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de ser promovido a tech lead, as bebidas sao por minha conta hoje!
translations.es: Acabo de ser promovido a tech lead, las bebidas corren por mi cuenta esta noche!
translations.fr: Je viens d'etre promu tech lead, c'est ma tournee ce soir!
translations.de: Ich wurde gerade zum Tech Lead befordert, heute Abend gebe ich einen aus!
translations.it: Sono appena stato promosso a tech lead, stasera offro io!

english: I can't believe they scheduled a mandatory fun event during peak sprint time.
context: Ironic comment about forced team activities at busy times

translations.pt-BR: Nao acredito que marcaram um evento obrigatorio de diversao no pico do sprint.
translations.es: No puedo creer que programaron un evento de diversion obligatorio en pleno sprint.
translations.fr: Je n'arrive pas a croire qu'ils ont programme un evenement fun obligatoire en plein sprint.
translations.de: Ich kann nicht glauben, dass sie ein Pflicht-Spass-Event mitten im Sprint geplant haben.
translations.it: Non posso credere che abbiano programmato un evento di divertimento obbligatorio nel mezzo dello sprint.

english: I heard the startup across the street has a nap room, should we ask for one too?
context: Joking about trendy office perks at other companies

translations.pt-BR: Ouvi dizer que a startup do outro lado da rua tem sala de soneca, deveriamos pedir uma tambem?
translations.es: Escuche que la startup de enfrente tiene sala de siesta, deberiamos pedir una tambien?
translations.fr: J'ai entendu dire que la startup d'en face a une salle de sieste, on devrait en demander une aussi?
translations.de: Ich habe gehort, das Startup gegenuber hat einen Schlafraum, sollten wir auch nach einem fragen?
translations.it: Ho sentito che la startup dall'altra parte della strada ha una stanza per i pisolini, dovremmo chiederne una anche noi?

english: I ran into our CTO at the gym yesterday, that was kind of awkward.
context: Casual story about bumping into colleagues outside work

translations.pt-BR: Encontrei nosso CTO na academia ontem, foi meio constrangedor.
translations.es: Me encontre con nuestro CTO en el gimnasio ayer, fue un poco incomodo.
translations.fr: J'ai croise notre CTO a la salle de sport hier, c'etait un peu genant.
translations.de: Ich bin gestern im Fitnessstudio unserem CTO begegnet, das war etwas unangenehm.
translations.it: Ho incontrato il nostro CTO in palestra ieri, e stato un po' imbarazzante.

english: I subscribed to way too many tech newsletters, my inbox is drowning.
context: Complaining about information overload from tech content

translations.pt-BR: Me inscrevi em newsletters de tecnologia demais, minha caixa de entrada esta afogando.
translations.es: Me suscribi a demasiados newsletters de tecnologia, mi bandeja de entrada se esta ahogando.
translations.fr: Je me suis inscrit a trop de newsletters tech, ma boite mail est noyee.
translations.de: Ich habe viel zu viele Tech-Newsletter abonniert, mein Posteingang geht unter.
translations.it: Mi sono iscritto a troppe newsletter tech, la mia casella di posta sta annegando.

english: Who wants to do a snack run? I'm going to the convenience store.
context: Offering to pick up snacks for the team

translations.pt-BR: Quem quer que eu traga lanche? Vou na lojinha.
translations.es: Quien quiere que le traiga algo? Voy a la tienda de la esquina.
translations.fr: Qui veut que je ramene des snacks? Je vais a l'epicerie.
translations.de: Wer will Snacks? Ich gehe zum Kiosk.
translations.it: Chi vuole che porti degli snack? Vado al negozio.

english: I've been learning a new language on Duolingo, Japanese is way harder than JavaScript.
context: Sharing a hobby and making a coding comparison joke

translations.pt-BR: Estou aprendendo uma nova lingua no Duolingo, japones e muito mais dificil que JavaScript.
translations.es: Estoy aprendiendo un nuevo idioma en Duolingo, japones es mucho mas dificil que JavaScript.
translations.fr: J'apprends une nouvelle langue sur Duolingo, le japonais c'est bien plus dur que le JavaScript.
translations.de: Ich lerne eine neue Sprache auf Duolingo, Japanisch ist viel schwerer als JavaScript.
translations.it: Sto imparando una nuova lingua su Duolingo, il giapponese e molto piu difficile di JavaScript.

english: My internet went out during the standup, can someone catch me up?
context: Asking for an update after a connectivity issue during a meeting

translations.pt-BR: Minha internet caiu durante a daily, alguem pode me atualizar?
translations.es: Se me cayo el internet durante la daily, alguien puede ponerme al dia?
translations.fr: Mon internet a plante pendant le standup, quelqu'un peut me faire un recap?
translations.de: Mein Internet ist wahrend des Standups ausgefallen, kann mich jemand auf den neuesten Stand bringen?
translations.it: Mi e caduta la connessione durante lo standup, qualcuno puo aggiornarmi?

english: I think I'm going to start running in the mornings, coding all day without exercise is rough.
context: Discussing fitness and developer lifestyle

translations.pt-BR: Acho que vou comecar a correr de manha, programar o dia todo sem exercicio e pesado.
translations.es: Creo que voy a empezar a correr por las mananas, programar todo el dia sin ejercicio es duro.
translations.fr: Je pense que je vais commencer a courir le matin, coder toute la journee sans sport c'est dur.
translations.de: Ich denke, ich fange an morgens zu laufen, den ganzen Tag programmieren ohne Bewegung ist hart.
translations.it: Penso che iniziero a correre al mattino, programmare tutto il giorno senza fare esercizio e dura.

english: That YouTube tutorial saved me hours of reading documentation.
context: Recommending a helpful tech video to a colleague

translations.pt-BR: Aquele tutorial no YouTube me economizou horas lendo documentacao.
translations.es: Ese tutorial de YouTube me ahorro horas de leer documentacion.
translations.fr: Ce tuto YouTube m'a fait gagner des heures de lecture de documentation.
translations.de: Dieses YouTube-Tutorial hat mir Stunden an Dokumentationslesen erspart.
translations.it: Quel tutorial su YouTube mi ha risparmiato ore di lettura della documentazione.

english: The AC is way too cold in here, I'm coding with a blanket on.
context: Complaining about office temperature

translations.pt-BR: O ar-condicionado esta gelado demais aqui, estou programando com um cobertor.
translations.es: El aire acondicionado esta demasiado frio aqui, estoy programando con una manta.
translations.fr: La clim est beaucoup trop froide ici, je code avec une couverture.
translations.de: Die Klimaanlage ist viel zu kalt hier, ich programmiere mit einer Decke.
translations.it: L'aria condizionata e troppo fredda qui, sto programmando con una coperta addosso.

english: I'm putting together a reading list of tech books, any suggestions?
context: Asking for book recommendations for professional development

translations.pt-BR: Estou montando uma lista de leitura de livros de tecnologia, alguma sugestao?
translations.es: Estoy armando una lista de lectura de libros de tecnologia, alguna sugerencia?
translations.fr: Je prepare une liste de lecture de livres tech, des suggestions?
translations.de: Ich stelle eine Leseliste mit Tech-Buchern zusammen, irgendwelche Vorschlage?
translations.it: Sto preparando una lista di lettura di libri tech, qualche suggerimento?

english: Our team Slack channel has more memes than actual work messages at this point.
context: Joking about the team chat culture

translations.pt-BR: O canal do time no Slack tem mais memes do que mensagens de trabalho a essa altura.
translations.es: El canal del equipo en Slack tiene mas memes que mensajes de trabajo a estas alturas.
translations.fr: Notre canal Slack d'equipe a plus de memes que de vrais messages de travail a ce stade.
translations.de: Unser Team-Slack-Kanal hat mittlerweile mehr Memes als echte Arbeitsnachrichten.
translations.it: Il canale Slack del team ha piu meme che messaggi di lavoro a questo punto.

english: I brought my own espresso machine to the office, best decision ever.
context: Sharing a workspace personalization win

translations.pt-BR: Trouxe minha propria maquina de espresso pro escritorio, melhor decisao de todas.
translations.es: Traje mi propia maquina de espresso a la oficina, la mejor decision de todas.
translations.fr: J'ai apporte ma propre machine a espresso au bureau, meilleure decision de ma vie.
translations.de: Ich habe meine eigene Espressomaschine ins Buro mitgebracht, beste Entscheidung aller Zeiten.
translations.it: Ho portato la mia macchinetta del caffe in ufficio, la miglior decisione di sempre.

english: Remember when we thought the cloud was just a buzzword? Now everything runs on it.
context: Reflecting on how tech trends evolved

translations.pt-BR: Lembra quando a gente achava que a nuvem era so uma palavra da moda? Agora tudo roda nela.
translations.es: Recuerdas cuando pensabamos que la nube era solo una palabra de moda? Ahora todo corre en ella.
translations.fr: Tu te souviens quand on pensait que le cloud n'etait qu'un buzzword? Maintenant tout tourne dessus.
translations.de: Erinnerst du dich, als wir dachten, die Cloud ware nur ein Buzzword? Jetzt lauft alles darauf.
translations.it: Ti ricordi quando pensavamo che il cloud fosse solo una parola di moda? Ora tutto gira li sopra.

english: Let me guess, you also have a hundred unfinished side projects on GitHub?
context: Joking about the common developer habit of starting many projects

translations.pt-BR: Deixa eu adivinhar, voce tambem tem cem projetos inacabados no GitHub?
translations.es: Dejame adivinar, tu tambien tienes cien proyectos sin terminar en GitHub?
translations.fr: Laisse-moi deviner, tu as aussi cent projets inacheves sur GitHub?
translations.de: Lass mich raten, du hast auch hundert unfertige Nebenprojekte auf GitHub?
translations.it: Fammi indovinare, anche tu hai cento progetti incompiuti su GitHub?

english: I just realized I've been on mute for the last five minutes of the call.
context: Embarrassing moment during a video meeting

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de perceber que estava no mudo nos ultimos cinco minutos da chamada.
translations.es: Acabo de darme cuenta de que estuve en silencio los ultimos cinco minutos de la llamada.
translations.fr: Je viens de realiser que j'etais en sourdine pendant les cinq dernieres minutes de l'appel.
translations.de: Ich habe gerade gemerkt, dass ich die letzten funf Minuten des Calls stumm geschaltet war.
translations.it: Ho appena realizzato che ero in muto negli ultimi cinque minuti della chiamata.

english: Did anyone else get that phishing email pretending to be from IT support?
context: Discussing a suspicious email received at work

translations.pt-BR: Mais alguem recebeu aquele email de phishing fingindo ser do suporte de TI?
translations.es: Alguien mas recibio ese correo de phishing haciendose pasar por soporte de TI?
translations.fr: Quelqu'un d'autre a recu ce mail de phishing qui pretendait venir du support IT?
translations.de: Hat noch jemand diese Phishing-Mail bekommen, die so tat, als ware sie vom IT-Support?
translations.it: Qualcun altro ha ricevuto quell'email di phishing che fingeva di essere del supporto IT?

english: We should order pizza for the late night deployment session.
context: Suggesting food for a team working late on a release

translations.pt-BR: Deveriamos pedir pizza pra sessao de deploy noturna.
translations.es: Deberiamos pedir pizza para la sesion nocturna de deploy.
translations.fr: On devrait commander des pizzas pour la session de deploiement de ce soir.
translations.de: Wir sollten Pizza bestellen fur die nachtliche Deployment-Session.
translations.it: Dovremmo ordinare pizza per la sessione di deploy notturna.

english: My one-on-one with the manager went really well, I feel valued on this team.
context: Sharing positive feedback after a manager meeting

translations.pt-BR: Meu one-on-one com o gerente foi muito bem, me sinto valorizado nesse time.
translations.es: Mi one-on-one con el gerente fue muy bien, me siento valorado en este equipo.
translations.fr: Mon one-on-one avec le manager s'est super bien passe, je me sens valorise dans l'equipe.
translations.de: Mein Einzelgesprach mit dem Manager lief richtig gut, ich fuhle mich im Team wertgeschatzt.
translations.it: Il mio one-on-one con il manager e andato molto bene, mi sento valorizzato in questo team.

english: I just bought a new ergonomic chair and my back already feels better.
context: Discussing home office gear upgrades

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de comprar uma cadeira ergonomica nova e minhas costas ja estao melhores.
translations.es: Acabo de comprar una silla ergonomica nueva y mi espalda ya se siente mejor.
translations.fr: Je viens d'acheter une nouvelle chaise ergonomique et mon dos se sent deja mieux.
translations.de: Ich habe mir gerade einen neuen ergonomischen Stuhl gekauft und mein Rucken fuhlt sich schon besser an.
translations.it: Ho appena comprato una sedia ergonomica nuova e la mia schiena sta gia meglio.

english: The intern asked me what Git is and I didn't know where to start explaining.
context: Funny moment mentoring a newcomer

translations.pt-BR: O estagiario me perguntou o que e Git e eu nao sabia por onde comecar a explicar.
translations.es: El pasante me pregunto que es Git y no supe por donde empezar a explicar.
translations.fr: Le stagiaire m'a demande ce qu'est Git et je ne savais pas par ou commencer.
translations.de: Der Praktikant hat mich gefragt, was Git ist, und ich wusste nicht, wo ich anfangen sollte.
translations.it: Lo stagista mi ha chiesto cos'e Git e non sapevo da dove iniziare a spiegare.

english: I just found out we have a learning budget, I'm signing up for that online course immediately.
context: Discovering and using a company benefit for education

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de descobrir que temos verba pra aprendizado, vou me inscrever naquele curso online agora mesmo.
translations.es: Acabo de enterarme de que tenemos presupuesto de aprendizaje, me inscribo en ese curso online de inmediato.
translations.fr: Je viens de decouvrir qu'on a un budget formation, je m'inscris a ce cours en ligne tout de suite.
translations.de: Ich habe gerade erfahren, dass wir ein Lernbudget haben, ich melde mich sofort fur diesen Online-Kurs an.
translations.it: Ho appena scoperto che abbiamo un budget per la formazione, mi iscrivo subito a quel corso online.

english: I keep watering this desk cactus and it still looks dead, am I doing something wrong?
context: Humorous struggle with office plant care

translations.pt-BR: Continuo regando esse cacto de mesa e ele ainda parece morto, estou fazendo algo errado?
translations.es: Sigo regando este cactus de escritorio y sigue pareciendo muerto, estoy haciendo algo mal?
translations.fr: Je continue d'arroser ce cactus de bureau et il a toujours l'air mort, je fais quelque chose de mal?
translations.de: Ich giesse diesen Schreibtischkaktus standig und er sieht immer noch tot aus, mache ich was falsch?
translations.it: Continuo ad annaffiare questo cactus da scrivania e sembra ancora morto, sto facendo qualcosa di sbagliato?

english: I wore my company hoodie to brunch and someone asked me if I work in tech.
context: Funny story about developer attire outside work

translations.pt-BR: Fui de moletom da empresa no brunch e alguem me perguntou se eu trabalho com tecnologia.
translations.es: Fui con la sudadera de la empresa al brunch y alguien me pregunto si trabajo en tech.
translations.fr: J'ai porte le sweat de l'entreprise au brunch et quelqu'un m'a demande si je travaillais dans la tech.
translations.de: Ich habe den Firmen-Hoodie beim Brunch getragen und jemand hat mich gefragt, ob ich in der Tech-Branche arbeite.
translations.it: Ho indossato la felpa dell'azienda al brunch e qualcuno mi ha chiesto se lavoro nel tech.

english: Is anyone else tired of Zoom calls or is it just me at this point?
context: Video call fatigue discussion

translations.pt-BR: Mais alguem esta cansado de chamadas no Zoom ou sou so eu a essa altura?
translations.es: Alguien mas esta cansado de las llamadas de Zoom o soy solo yo a estas alturas?
translations.fr: Quelqu'un d'autre en a marre des appels Zoom ou c'est juste moi a ce stade?
translations.de: Ist noch jemand Zoom-Calls leid oder bin das nur ich mittlerweile?
translations.it: Qualcun altro e stanco delle chiamate Zoom o sono solo io a questo punto?

english: The new office building has a rooftop terrace, perfect for afternoon coding sessions.
context: Talking about a new office space feature

translations.pt-BR: O novo predio do escritorio tem um terraco no telhado, perfeito pra sessoes de codigo a tarde.
translations.es: El nuevo edificio de la oficina tiene una terraza en la azotea, perfecta para sesiones de codigo por la tarde.
translations.fr: Le nouveau batiment du bureau a une terrasse sur le toit, parfait pour coder l'apres-midi.
translations.de: Das neue Burogebaude hat eine Dachterrasse, perfekt fur Coding-Sessions am Nachmittag.
translations.it: Il nuovo edificio dell'ufficio ha una terrazza sul tetto, perfetta per sessioni di programmazione al pomeriggio.

english: I accidentally left my mic on during lunch and the whole team heard me eating.
context: Embarrassing remote work moment

translations.pt-BR: Esqueci meu microfone ligado durante o almoco e o time inteiro me ouviu comendo.
translations.es: Accidentalmente deje el microfono encendido durante el almuerzo y todo el equipo me escucho comiendo.
translations.fr: J'ai accidentellement laisse mon micro allume pendant le dejeuner et toute l'equipe m'a entendu manger.
translations.de: Ich habe versehentlich mein Mikro wahrend der Mittagspause angelassen und das ganze Team hat mich essen gehort.
translations.it: Ho accidentalmente lasciato il microfono acceso durante il pranzo e tutto il team mi ha sentito mangiare.

english: Want to join a board game night at my place this Saturday?
context: Inviting colleagues to a social gathering outside work

translations.pt-BR: Quer vir pra uma noite de jogos de tabuleiro na minha casa neste sabado?
translations.es: Quieres venir a una noche de juegos de mesa en mi casa este sabado?
translations.fr: Tu veux venir a une soiree jeux de societe chez moi ce samedi?
translations.de: Hast du Lust auf einen Brettspielabend bei mir diesen Samstag?
translations.it: Vuoi venire a una serata di giochi da tavolo a casa mia questo sabato?

english: I tried to explain to my family what I do for a living and they still think I fix computers.
context: Relatable humor about explaining software development to non-tech people

translations.pt-BR: Tentei explicar pra minha familia o que eu faco e eles ainda acham que eu conserto computadores.
translations.es: Intente explicar a mi familia lo que hago y todavia creen que arreglo computadoras.
translations.fr: J'ai essaye d'expliquer a ma famille ce que je fais et ils pensent encore que je repare des ordinateurs.
translations.de: Ich habe versucht meiner Familie zu erklaren, was ich beruflich mache, und sie denken immer noch, ich repariere Computer.
translations.it: Ho provato a spiegare alla mia famiglia cosa faccio per vivere e pensano ancora che ripari computer.

english: The free snack shelf is empty again, who's in charge of restocking?
context: Asking about office snack supplies

translations.pt-BR: A prateleira de lanches gratis esta vazia de novo, quem e responsavel por reabastecer?
translations.es: La estanteria de snacks gratis esta vacia otra vez, quien se encarga de reponerla?
translations.fr: L'etagere des snacks gratuits est encore vide, qui s'occupe du reapprovisionnement?
translations.de: Das Regal mit den kostenlosen Snacks ist wieder leer, wer ist furs Auffallen zustandig?
translations.it: Lo scaffale degli snack gratis e vuoto di nuovo, chi si occupa di rifornirlo?

english: I just found a commit message from two years ago that says 'fix stuff', no context at all.
context: Laughing at old unhelpful commit messages in the codebase

translations.pt-BR: Acabei de encontrar uma mensagem de commit de dois anos atras que diz 'corrigir coisas', sem contexto nenhum.
translations.es: Acabo de encontrar un mensaje de commit de hace dos anos que dice 'arreglar cosas', sin contexto alguno.
translations.fr: Je viens de trouver un message de commit d'il y a deux ans qui dit 'corriger trucs', aucun contexte.
translations.de: Ich habe gerade eine Commit-Nachricht von vor zwei Jahren gefunden, die 'Zeug fixen' sagt, null Kontext.
translations.it: Ho appena trovato un messaggio di commit di due anni fa che dice 'sistemare roba', senza contesto.

english: Are you coming to the company picnic next weekend?
context: Asking about attendance at a company social event

translations.pt-BR: Voce vai ao piquenique da empresa no proximo fim de semana?
translations.es: Vas al picnic de la empresa el proximo fin de semana?
translations.fr: Tu viens au pique-nique de l'entreprise le week-end prochain?
translations.de: Kommst du zum Firmenpicknick nachstes Wochenende?
translations.it: Vieni al picnic aziendale il prossimo fine settimana?

english: I need to update my LinkedIn profile, it still says junior developer from three years ago.
context: Discussing online professional presence and career growth

translations.pt-BR: Preciso atualizar meu perfil no LinkedIn, ainda diz desenvolvedor junior de tres anos atras.
translations.es: Necesito actualizar mi perfil de LinkedIn, todavia dice desarrollador junior de hace tres anos.
translations.fr: Je dois mettre a jour mon profil LinkedIn, il dit encore developpeur junior d'il y a trois ans.
translations.de: Ich muss mein LinkedIn-Profil aktualisieren, da steht immer noch Junior-Entwickler von vor drei Jahren.
translations.it: Devo aggiornare il mio profilo LinkedIn, dice ancora sviluppatore junior di tre anni fa.

english: The elevator is broken so I took the stairs, that's my workout for the day.
context: Light-hearted comment about an office inconvenience

translations.pt-BR: O elevador esta quebrado entao subi de escada, esse e meu exercicio do dia.
translations.es: El ascensor esta roto asi que subi por las escaleras, ese es mi ejercicio del dia.
translations.fr: L'ascenseur est en panne alors j'ai pris les escaliers, c'est mon sport de la journee.
translations.de: Der Aufzug ist kaputt, also bin ich die Treppe gelaufen, das war mein Training fur heute.
translations.it: L'ascensore e rotto quindi ho fatto le scale, questo e il mio allenamento del giorno.

english: I set up a Raspberry Pi as a dashboard for our build status, it looks awesome on my desk.
context: Sharing a fun tech project for workspace personalization

translations.pt-BR: Montei um Raspberry Pi como painel do status dos nossos builds, fica incrivel na minha mesa.
translations.es: Monte una Raspberry Pi como dashboard del estado de nuestros builds, se ve genial en mi escritorio.
translations.fr: J'ai configure un Raspberry Pi comme tableau de bord pour le statut de nos builds, ca rend super sur mon bureau.
translations.de: Ich habe einen Raspberry Pi als Dashboard fur unseren Build-Status eingerichtet, sieht super aus auf meinem Schreibtisch.
translations.it: Ho configurato un Raspberry Pi come dashboard per lo stato delle nostre build, sta benissimo sulla mia scrivania.
